# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React TypeScript frontend application built with Vite, serving as the client-side interface for a comprehensive HR management system. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Technology Stack
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build System**: Vite with SWC compiler
- **Routing**: React Router DOM v6 with protected routes
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, custom hooks for local state
- **UI Framework**: Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS
- **Backend Integration**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Real-time)
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation
- **Rich Text**: Tiptap editor
- **Charts**: Recharts
- **Testing**: Vitest + React Testing Library + Playwright

## Application Structure

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap, renders App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing configuration

### Routing Architecture
The application uses React Router with a hierarchical route structure:

#### Public Routes
- `/`: Root redirect (authenticated → dashboard, unauthenticated → login)
- `/login`: Authentication page
- `/forgot-password`: Password recovery

#### Protected Routes (wrapped in AppLayout)
All protected routes require authentication and role-based access control.

**Core Routes**:
- `/dashboard`: Main dashboard
- `/employees`: Employee management (list, profile, forms)
- `/projects`: Project management (list, detail, forms)
- `/clients`: Client management
- `/invoices`: Invoice management
- `/hr-policies`: HR policy documents
- `/evaluations`: Quarterly performance evaluations
- `/evaluations/daily`: Daily feedback evaluations
- `/loans`: Employee loan management
- `/payroll`: Payroll processing
- `/my-payslip`: Personal payslip access
- `/finance`: Financial dashboard
- `/settings`: System configuration
- `/holidays`: Public holiday management

### Component Architecture

#### Layout Components
- `AppLayout`: Main application layout with sidebar navigation
- `AppSidebar`: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `TopBar`: Top navigation bar with user menu and notifications

#### UI Components
Complete shadcn/ui component library implementation:
- Form controls (Button, Input, Select, etc.)
- Layout components (Card, Sheet, Dialog, etc.)
- Data display (Table, Chart, Badge, etc.)
- Feedback (Toast, Alert, Progress, etc.)

#### Feature Components
- `BeudoxLogo`: Brand logo component with variant support
- `NavLink`: Enhanced React Router NavLink with active state styling
- `SearchableEmployeeSelect`: Employee selection dropdown with search
- `EvaluationTimeline`: Historical evaluation display component
- `RichTextEditor`: Tiptap-based rich text editor for policies

### State Management

#### Server State (React Query)
- Employee data and profiles
- Project and client information
- Evaluation records
- Financial data (payroll, invoices)
- HR policies and settings

#### Local State (React Hooks)
- UI state (modals, forms, filters)
- Authentication state
- Form state (React Hook Form)

### Authentication & Authorization

#### Authentication Flow
- Supabase Auth integration
- Session management with automatic refresh
- Password reset and invite flows
- Loading states to prevent content flash

#### Role-Based Access Control
Five user roles with granular permissions:

- **employee**: Basic access (dashboard, evaluations, projects, payslip)
- **team_lead**: Team management (employee access + team oversight)
- **hr_manager**: HR operations (employee management, settings, policies)
- **finance_manager**: Financial operations (payroll, invoices, finance)
- **ceo**: Full system access

Access control implemented via:
- `canAccess()` function in `src/lib/role-access.ts`
- `ProtectedRoute` component wrapping sensitive routes
- UI-level hiding of inaccessible features

### Data Layer

#### Supabase Integration
- Client configuration in `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`
- Type-safe database operations
- Real-time subscriptions for live updates
- Row Level Security (RLS) policies

#### Database Schema
19 migration files defining:
- User management (employees, roles)
- Project and client management
- Financial entities (invoices, payroll, loans)
- Evaluation systems (quarterly, daily)
- HR policies and settings
- Audit trails and metadata

### Key Business Logic

#### Evaluation System
- **Quarterly Evaluations**: Comprehensive reviews with scoring (1-5), comments, recommendations
- **Daily Evaluations**: Quick feedback with direction (positive/constructive), remarks
- Timeline visualization combining both evaluation types
- Role-based visibility (managers see recommendations, employees see their own)

#### Payroll Processing
- Automated payroll generation
- Allowance and deduction calculations
- Overtime tracking (regular and holiday)
- PDF generation for payslips

#### Financial Management
- Invoice generation with PDF export
- Client billing and payment tracking
- Expense management
- Financial reporting dashboard

### Development Workflow

#### Build & Development
- Vite dev server with hot reload
- TypeScript compilation with strict mode
- ESLint for code quality
- Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens

#### Testing Strategy
- Unit tests with Vitest
- Component testing with React Testing Library
- E2E testing with Playwright
- Test coverage reporting

#### Configuration Files
- `vite.config.ts`: Build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Styling configuration
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `eslint.config.js`: Linting rules
- `playwright.config.ts`: E2E test configuration

### Performance Considerations

- React Query for efficient data fetching and caching
- Lazy loading of route components
- Optimized bundle splitting
- Image optimization and lazy loading
- Database query optimization with proper indexing

### Security Measures

- Supabase RLS policies
- Input validation with Zod schemas
- XSS protection through React's built-in sanitization
- CSRF protection via Supabase
- Secure authentication flows
- Role-based data access control

This application serves as a complete HR management solution, handling everything from employee onboarding to financial reporting, with a focus on user experience, security, and maintainability.
